messages.content: We are open Monday to Friday 08:00 to 18:00 and Saturday 09:00 to 13:00. We are closed on Sundays and public holidays.
and how do I get a quote
Use the contact form on our website or email hello@example.com with a short description of the job. We reply with a fixed quote within one working day.
messages.matched_question: How do I get a quote?

messages.content: We cover Example Town and everywhere within roughly 40 km of it. Not sure if that includes you? Send us your postcode and we will confirm.
I have a complaint about my last visit, I want to speak to someone
No problem — I've passed this conversation to the team. Someone will pick it up and get back to you shortly.
Can I bring my dog to the showroom?
I'm not sure about that one, sorry. Try rephrasing your question — or say "speak to someone" and I'll pass you over to the team.
